---
title: "Frances Alethea Hickes"
---

## Frances Alethea Hickes

**Dates:** (1845-1929)

**Maiden name:** (Pode)

### Description

first cousin of CMY

### Biography

Daughter of WCY’s sister Anne (Yonge) Pode, and sister of John Duke Pode,  Charlotte Cordelia (Pode) Yonge and Anne Catharina (Pode) Woollcombe, she married (1873)  the Rev. Thomas Harold Frederick Hickes (d. 1907), who was curate of Hursley in 1875 [PO Directory Hants 1875; LG 1952; birth register]

### Letters

- Letter from March 7th 1876 [6 March 1876]
- Letter from Jany 4th [1870]
- Letter from May 12th [1862]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
